prompt: I have an idea for an app that helps people find local mechanics they can trust. Like a mix between Yelp and Angi but specifically for auto repair. I've been ripped off twice and I know I'm not the only one.

assertions.text: Asks follow-up interview questions rather than jumping straight to generating everything
Creates separate brief.md and PROGRESS.md files in proper directory structure
Interview questions cover at least 3 distinct areas (idea, market, founder, business model)
Identifies specific information gaps or unknowns from the vague input
